title: Web Application Brute Force Detection (Frequency Analysis)
description: Identifies IPs performing brute force attacks against web login endpoints by counting 401/403 responses. Uses frequency analysis (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking) to surface credential stuffing and brute force campaigns.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ('Response Code' = '401' or 'Response Code' = '403') and ('Request URL' like '*login*' or 'Request URL' like '*auth*' or 'Request URL' like '*signin*') | stats count as failed_attempts, unique('Request URL') as targeted_endpoints by 'Client IP' | sort -failed_attempts | where failed_attempts > 10
